reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve my reasoning capabilities, which is particularly useful for the Science & Mathematics categories available in the current doors.

Unlocking pe_plan provides the Reflection skill, which allows for a second LLM call to review and correct the answer. This significantly increases accuracy and helps preserve HP while maximizing XP gain.

I will unlock the reflection skill to improve my accuracy on higher-level questions. This skill provides an additional LLM call to review and correct my initial answer, which is crucial for tackling Level 3 challenges and safely using the Double Down ability.
Unlocking ctx_enough to ensure I have access to previous question and answer context, which may be vital for identifying patterns or solving complex puzzles in future chambers.

I have 1 Skill Point available and ctx_overload costs 1 SP. Unlocking this skill will ensure that my full chat history is included in every call, providing better continuity and memory for future chambers.
